reasoning_model_1: The model perfectly follows the content instructions, synthesizing the text '嗯，这个菜的味道真不错！' accurately without any omissions or additions. In terms of the 'Non-verbal vocalization' (非语言发声) dimension, the audio begins at 00:00 with a distinct, prolonged 'Hmm' (嗯) sound that includes a breathy, savoring quality typical of someone enjoying food. This effectively simulates the 'smacking lips/tasting' vibe requested by the prompt context ('带咂嘴的方式'). The prosody is natural, and the non-verbal element blends seamlessly with the spoken words, enhancing the expression of enjoyment.
reasoning_model_2: The model fails the content accuracy criterion significantly. While it starts with 'Hmm' and says a variation of the target text ('这菜味道真不错' instead of '这个菜的味道真不错'), it proceeds to hallucinate a large amount of extra text: '但咋香得直咂嘴，筷子都停不下来，简直绝了' (but it smells so good I keep smacking my lips, chopsticks can't stop, simply amazing). Instead of simply performing the 'smacking lips' style non-verbally throughout, the model explicitly verbalizes the description of the action ('直咂嘴'). This violation of the script invalidates the generation despite the initial 'Hmm' sound.
model_comparison: Model 1 (T1) is the clear winner. T1 accurately reproduces the target script and integrates the required non-verbal vocalization ('Hmm' savoring sound) naturally at the beginning, fitting the 'smacking lips' style instruction in a paralinguistic manner. Model 2 (T2), conversely, fails the fundamental content constraints by adding a significant amount of hallucinated text that describes the action rather than just performing it. T2's modification of the core sentence ('zhe cai' vs 'zhege cai') is also a minor content error, but the addition of the extra sentence is a major failure.
